response.step_by_step_log: I analyzed the video and identified two distinct segments. The first part (00:00-04:19) is a montage of clips featuring the performer Natsuiro Matsuri. The second part (04:19-05:03) is her singing on stage. I identified the song by reading the text on screen at 04:20 ("世界一可愛い私" and "HoneyWorks"). I used the search query 'HoneyWorks "世界一可愛い私" lyrics' to find the lyrics in Japanese and translated them into English to fulfill the requirements.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual performer, Natsuiro Matsuri, presenting a performance of the song "Sekaiichi Kawaii Watashi" originally by HoneyWorks. The video is structured with an introductory montage of her past activities followed by the main stage performance.

scenes.description: Introductory montage of various clips of the virtual performer, Natsuiro Matsuri, spanning several years.
The virtual performer, Natsuiro Matsuri, performs the song "Sekaiichi Kawaii Watashi" on stage. On-screen text identifies the song title and composer HoneyWorks.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
世界一？可愛い
宇宙一？可愛い
もっともっと聞かせて
ご褒美は…目を閉じて？
ちゅ
見つけてくれてサンキュー
愛してくれてサンキュー
生き甲斐にしちゃってもいいのよ
一人じゃ無理だ 逆境
みんながいれば最強
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Cutest in the world? Cute.
宇宙一？可愛い
Let me hear it more and more.
As a reward... close your eyes?
Chu
Thank you for finding me.
Thank you for loving me.
It's okay to make me your reason for living.
Adversity is impossible alone.
But with everyone, I'm the strongest.
